title: Login Authentication Error
description: User unable to login with correct credentials. Shows invalid token message.

title: Payment Gateway Failure
description: Credit card payment fails during checkout process.

title: Dashboard Loading Slow
description: Admin dashboard takes more than 15 seconds to load.

title: Email Notification Not Sending
description: Password reset email not received by users.

title: Profile Image Upload Failed
description: Users cannot upload profile pictures in PNG format.

title: Mobile Responsive Issue
description: Website layout breaks on small screen devices.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: Product search returns no results even for valid keywords.

title: Session Timeout Too Short
description: User session expires within 2 minutes of inactivity.

title: File Download Error
description: Reports cannot be downloaded in PDF format.

title: Data Sync Issue
description: Customer data not syncing between mobile and web app.

title: UI Alignment Bug
description: Buttons overlap text in Safari browser.

title: OTP Verification Delay
description: OTP takes more than 1 minute to arrive.

title: Subscription Renewal Failed
description: Automatic renewal does not process successfully.

title: Security Warning Message
description: Users see SSL warning in older browsers.
